---
name: Bug Report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: Olayiwolaaa
---

## What happened?

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What should have happened.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages or console output.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, paste logs or attach screenshots here.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- Browser: (e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125) — if UI-related
- Docker version: (run `docker --version`)
- Node version: (run `node --version`) — if running outside Docker

## Additional Context

Anything else that might be relevant.
